name: CSV Data Analyzer
description: Analyze CSV data and extract insights

agents.name: Data Analyzer
agents.purpose: Analyze CSV data for patterns and statistics
agents.system_prompt_hint: Analyze the CSV data. Calculate summary statistics (mean, median, min, max, std). Identify trends, outliers, and correlations. Group and aggregate data meaningfully.

agents.name: Insight Writer
agents.purpose: Write a data analysis report with key insights
agents.system_prompt_hint: Write a clear data analysis report. Include: summary statistics, key findings, trends, anomalies, and actionable recommendations. Use tables to present numbers clearly.

suggestion_card.title: CSV Analyzer
suggestion_card.subtitle: Analyze data and get insights
suggestion_card.prompt_template: Analyze this data: [paste CSV or describe]

author: agentfactory
